seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eden Valley and Edillilie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Eden Valley vs Edillilie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eden Valley and Edillilie.
heading: Eden Valley vs Edillilie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eden Valley, South Australia and Edillilie, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eden Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Edillilie (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eden Valley or Edillilie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eden Valley has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Edillilie scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eden Valley scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Edillilie scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eden Valley or Edillilie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eden Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
